= IKE Integration Tests Example

End-to-end smoke tests that exercise the IKE Network release
        cascade as external consumers would. Each IT case clones the
        intended usage pattern (doc-only project, java + docs, BOM
        import, ws:create scaffold) in a fresh Maven environment and
        asserts that the build succeeds and produces the expected
        artifacts.
